subject: Marco needs your help

body:
Marco is facing a really tough re-election campaign.
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36952577:WlpJvgYSN:m:1:1328517760:51C82502F86114538FC92AE22B12DF5A:r)

Friend,

I just got off the phone with Marco's Campaign Manager and he told me the situation they are facing right now in Florida.

Marco is facing a really tough re-election campaign. They have set a goal to raise 1 Million by their August 30th Primary, and I told him I would email my most loyal friends and supporters to see if they could help Marco.

Friend, I know how busy you are and how valuable your time is so I'll make this short.

[**Marco Rubio needs our help before his primary.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36952577:WlpJvgYSN:m:1:1328517760:51C82502F86114538FC92AE22B12DF5A:r)

[**Can Marco count on you, Friend, to chip in right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36952577:WlpJvgYSN:m:1:1328517760:51C82502F86114538FC92AE22B12DF5A:r)

[**Friend's
🚨 Marco Rubio Primary Donation 🚨
_Donate Now >>>_**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36952577:WlpJvgYSN:m:1:1328517760:51C82502F86114538FC92AE22B12DF5A:r)
Not only is he running a shortened campaign (he announced his campaign for re-election in mid-June, less than 50 days ago) but he's up against the national Democrat machine in Florida. This means he's had WAY less time to campaign and raise money than his opponents.

You see, **Democrats are eyeing Florida as the key to winning back the Senate**. They're already running ads across Florida featuring President Obama urging people to vote for their Democrat candidate. Friend, they are gearing up to spend millions to take down Marco and we need to make sure that doesn't happen.

Marco's voice and vote in the Senate are crucial to the future of our nation. He is a stalwart supporter of the conservative values that you and I hold dear, and we must do whatever it takes to make certain Marco wins re-election.

It is imperative Marco reaches this $1 million goal by his primary in order to win and show the Democrats his campaign is going to win in November.

[**Friend's
🚨 Marco Rubio Primary Donation 🚨
_Donate Now >>>_**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36952577:WlpJvgYSN:m:1:1328517760:51C82502F86114538FC92AE22B12DF5A:r)
No matter what state you live in, **the election in Florida matters to you**. The balance of the Senate hangs on the outcome of this election in Florida. We MUST keep Florida red and Marco working for our nation's future.

I hope you will join me in standing up for Marco.

Thanks,
Trey Gowdy

[**P.S. Friend, I'll be looking at the list of donors to this email and I hope I'll see your name as not only a friend of mine but of Marco's as well. If you want to live in a safe, more prosperous nation then we must ensure Marco Rubio remains fighting for us in the Senate.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36952577:WlpJvgYSN:m:1:1328517760:51C82502F86114538FC92AE22B12DF5A:r)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Our very ambitious next goal:
body:
As part of My Faith Votes' plan to reach 45 million people of
faith and get 1.3 million nonvoters in swing states to the polls,
we are now digging even deeper to reach a group that is often
overlooked at our own peril -- millennials.

Millennials are now the largest generation in U.S. history,
numbering over 83.1 million, yet they are the generation with the
lowest voter participation.

It is imperative that we get this generation off the sidelines,
and here's how we can do it...

My Faith Votes is partnering with a group called im2moro to
inspire and motivate 450,000 millennial students to vote in
November. Specifically, we will reach 150,000 students on 30
Christian college campuses in swing states, and at least another
300,000 through their social media connections.

With these students living away from home, we will use proven
technology to simplify the process for each student to get
registered and successfully cast an absentee ballot.

I'm told this initiative will cost approximately $90,000 and the
good news is that a very generous donor has committed to match at
least $10,000 of what we're able to raise online. Will you help
us reach our goal with a tax-deducible donation right now?

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=62

If you're wondering if your donation will make a difference, let
me share something with you.

The other week, I reached out about an emergency situation in
California. There was a bill in the State Senate to strip
California's faith-based colleges and universities from operating
in ways consistent with their religious missions. Well guess
what? The response was overwhelming and the controversial bill
has now been amended to preserve exemptions for religious
schools. The fact is, through the strength of our supporters, My
Faith Votes played an absolutely critical role and posted a big
win for religious liberty.

Together, this is the kind of impact we can have -- both at the
state and federal level. This is not a theory. Now it's time to
put our resources to work in order to get millennials off the
sidelines in 2016, and I have no doubt whatsoever that we can get
it done.

So Peter, please help us hit our financial goal with a
tax-deductible donation now. We're itching to get to work and
deliver another victory for our Judeo-Christian values.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=62

Thank you so much for your ongoing support, we truly cannot do
this without you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2caf/738133e4/30dadee2/7f82e460/2292955585/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160811/?subsource=ngpattre160811")
---
| Friend -- Today, Marco Rubio is scheduled to speak at an Orlando rally hosted by the American Renewal Project, which is sponsored by the American Family Association -- an organization classified as "rabidly anti-gay and anti-Muslim" and a "hate group" by the Southern Poverty Law Center.

Two months ago, the Pulse shooting devastated the LGBT community in Orlando and across our state. For Florida's Senator to speak alongside leaders espousing bigotry is a disgrace and we won't tolerate it.

**I have been a strong advocate for the protection of LGBT rights.[Add your name to stand with me and demand Marco Rubio withdraw from this hate rally >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2caf/738133e4/30dadee2/7f82e460/2292955585/VEsE/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160811/?subsource=ngpattre160811")**

In his attempt to defend his indefensible appearance, Marco Rubio referenced "strong values." Strong values like discrimination and hate? **This isn 't what Florida stands for and this isn't what I stand for.** We fight for love, acceptance and equal rights for the LGBT community and all Floridians. I call on Marco Rubio to immediately withdraw from this hate rally and apologize to the LGBT community he is supposed to represent.

[**Sign my petition to stand with me and let Marco Rubio know: we stand with the LGBT community.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2caf/738133e4/30dadee2/7f82e460/2292955585/VEsF/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160811/?subsource=ngpattre160811")

Thank you,
Patrick

body:

Earlier this week at a rally, Donald Trump said that if his supporters don’t like Hillary’s judicial appointments, the “Second Amendment people” can do something about it.

It doesn't matter what he later says he meant. This can't go on.

We must defeat Trump, and defeat him badly. Donald Trump must lose this election in such a way that the kind of reactionary, fear-based, violent politics he champions never again rears its head in America.

We need to win with millions of people voting, volunteering, and donating. We need to unite and send a message that together we are stronger than anything Trump might say or inspire.

That means we need you right now, Peter.

subject: Just checking in, are you registered to vote?
body:
We’re going to build a country where all kids can achieve their dreams | Peter --

I have a simple but important question for you: Are you registered to vote yet?

We can raise a whole lot of money, we can build the strongest ground game in history, and we can have a supremely qualified and progressive ticket like Hillary and Tim fighting for us. But NONE of that will matter if we don’t turn out our supporters to vote -- and that starts with you being registered.

**[Registering or finding out your registration status takes just a minute. Make sure you’re signed up, fired up, and ready to elect Hillary!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYyMTE2NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxOTU2MTk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

There hasn’t been an election this important in my lifetime, Peter. Early voting and vote-by-mail will be gearing up in many states in less than two months. And the final showdown is just around the corner on November 8th. We need you in the ring! Are you ready to go? It takes less than a minute to find out.

**Don’t wait another second to find out if you’re registered or to get registered:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=55&ms=MjYyMTE2NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxOTU2MTk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: too extreme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
>
> Friend,
>
> How low can he go? Every time we think Donald Trump has hit a new bottom, he finds a way to go lower still.
>
> This week, at a campaign stop in North Carolina, Trump suggested that "the Second Amendment" could be the remedy to Hillary Clinton and her potential Supreme Court selections.
>
> That's right, the Republican presidential nominee openly suggested acts of political violence against his opponent and her Administration. This is NOT politics as usual, friend.
>
> The possibility of a Trump presidency has never been more real-- or more dangerous. But that doesn't seem to bother Chris's Republican opponent. She, unlike so many members of her own party, has REFUSED to denounce Donald Trump despite his dangerous call for violent insurrection. And her campaign is supported and funded by the NRA.
>
> [**Please, add your name and tell our Republican opponent to DENOUNCE Trump and his reckless rhetoric about armed insurrection.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a27/70cdc2ba/470e2ba9/39768d6/720565436/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/denounce-trump-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+add+your+name+and+tell+o&utm_campaign=em081116&source=em081116")
>
> Calls for political violence have no place in our nation or in Maryland. We have no idea just how far Trump will go, and we can't afford to find out.
